name: Eggnog Cheese Cake
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces French vanilla instant pudding mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut 1 inch crosswise off of each cookie. Crush the short pieces; set long ones aside for garnish.
2. Mix the cookie crumbs, Graham cracker crumbs, and butter. Press this mixture firmly into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
3. Beat the cream cheese in a large bowl until smooth.
4. Gradually add 1 cup of Eggnog, blending until smooth.
5. Add remaining Eggnog, Buttermilk, pudding mix, Rum, and nutmeg. Continue beating until well blended.
6. Carefully pour into the springform pan.
7. Chill until firm, usually approximately 3 hours.
8. Remove the sides of the pan.
9. Place the remaining cookie pieces on top as a garnish, then top with whipped cream.
10. Serves 10-12. Enjoy!
